Nikola Vasilj.bio: Bosnia's first-choice goalkeeper who has established himself as one of the most reliable keepers in German football at FC St. Pauli. Rose through the ranks at Zrinjski Mostar before making the move to Germany.
Nikola Vasilj.playingStyle: Commanding goalkeeper with excellent shot-stopping ability, strong communication skills, and composure in high-pressure situations
Nikola Vasilj.worldCup2026Role: Undisputed starting goalkeeper and penalty shootout specialist after heroic performances in qualifying play-offs
Nikola Vasilj.notableFact: Was the hero of the playoff qualification campaign, saving penalties against both Wales and Italy to send Bosnia to the 2026 World Cup

Sead Kolasinac.bio: A powerful, marauding left-back who built his reputation at Schalke 04 and Arsenal before moving to Italy. Kolasinac is one of the most physically imposing full-backs in European football and a leader in the Bosnia squad.
Sead Kolasinac.playingStyle: Physically dominant attacking left-back who bombs forward with power and delivers dangerous crosses into the box
Sead Kolasinac.worldCup2026Role: Starting left-back providing width, physicality, and crucial experience from years in the Premier League and Serie A
Sead Kolasinac.notableFact: Made headlines off the pitch in 2019 when he fought off armed robbers who attacked him and Arsenal teammate Mesut Ozil in London

Anel Ahmedhodzic.bio: A Swedish-born Bosnian center-back who chose to represent the country of his parents. Ahmedhodzic impressed in the Championship with Sheffield United and is considered one of Bosnia's most talented young defenders.
Anel Ahmedhodzic.playingStyle: Ball-playing center-back with excellent passing range, comfortable stepping into midfield and initiating attacks from deep
Anel Ahmedhodzic.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back and key figure in building play from the back in Barbarez's system
Anel Ahmedhodzic.notableFact: Born and raised in Malmo, Sweden, to Bosnian parents; chose to represent Bosnia despite being eligible for Sweden

Dennis Hadzikadunic.bio: A reliable and versatile center-back who has been a consistent performer for Bosnia and Herzegovina. Hadzikadunic plays his club football in Sweden with Malmoe FF and brings stability to the Bosnian backline.
Dennis Hadzikadunic.playingStyle: Disciplined, no-nonsense center-back who excels in one-on-one defending and organizing the defensive line
Dennis Hadzikadunic.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back partnering Ahmedhodzic to form a solid and complementary defensive pairing
Dennis Hadzikadunic.notableFact: Has been one of the most consistent performers in Barbarez's tenure, rarely missing a competitive match

Sasa Kalajdzic.bio: A towering Austrian-born striker of Bosnian descent who declared for Bosnia and Herzegovina. Known for his aerial ability and clinical finishing, Kalajdzic has been a Bundesliga striker at VfB Stuttgart despite battling serious knee injuries.
Sasa Kalajdzic.playingStyle: Target man striker who dominates in the air, holds up play effectively, and finishes with composure inside the box
Sasa Kalajdzic.worldCup2026Role: Impact substitute and aerial threat option, providing a different dimension to the attack
Sasa Kalajdzic.notableFact: Has overcome two serious ACL injuries during his career, showing remarkable determination to return to top-level football each time

Amar Dedic.bio: One of Bosnia's brightest young talents, Dedic has thrived at RB Salzburg and is considered among the best right-backs in Austrian football. A product of the Salzburg academy system with an exciting attacking profile.
Amar Dedic.playingStyle: Modern attacking right-back with pace, technical quality, and excellent delivery from wide positions
Amar Dedic.worldCup2026Role: Starting right-back and a key outlet in attack, providing width and dynamism down the right flank
Amar Dedic.notableFact: Won multiple Austrian Bundesliga titles with RB Salzburg and has featured regularly in the Champions League at a young age

Edin Dzeko.bio: Bosnia's all-time leading scorer and greatest ever player. Dzeko has scored over 65 international goals across a legendary career that included spells at Manchester City, Roma, and Inter Milan. The Diamond of Bosnia.
Edin Dzeko.playingStyle: Complete center-forward with exceptional movement, clinical finishing with either foot, and the ability to bring teammates into play
Edin Dzeko.worldCup2026Role: Veteran squad leader and talisman. At 40, expected to serve as an iconic presence and potential impact substitute in the twilight of his career
Edin Dzeko.notableFact: Bosnia's all-time top scorer with over 65 goals. Won the Premier League title with Manchester City and Serie A with Inter Milan. Scored Bosnia's first-ever World Cup goal against Argentina in 2014

Rade Krunic.bio: An experienced midfielder who has played at the highest level in Italy with AC Milan and Empoli before moving to Turkey. Krunic is a versatile, hardworking midfielder who provides balance and composure.
Rade Krunic.playingStyle: Intelligent box-to-box midfielder who connects play, wins possession in central areas, and provides tactical discipline
Rade Krunic.worldCup2026Role: Experienced midfield option providing depth and tactical flexibility in the center of the park
Rade Krunic.notableFact: Won the Serie A title with AC Milan in the 2021-22 season, playing an important role in their first Scudetto in 11 years

Ermedin Demirovic.bio: A prolific striker who has become one of the Bundesliga's most consistent goal-scorers at VfB Stuttgart after impressive spells at Augsburg and Freiburg. Demirovic is the leading man of Bosnia's attack.
Ermedin Demirovic.playingStyle: Dynamic, mobile striker who combines pressing intensity with clinical finishing, excellent at running the channels and linking play
Ermedin Demirovic.worldCup2026Role: First-choice striker and the team's primary goal threat, leading the line with energy and quality
Ermedin Demirovic.notableFact: Has scored consistently across multiple Bundesliga clubs and was a key figure in Stuttgart's resurgent 2023-24 campaign

Haris Tabakovic.bio: A late bloomer who rose from Germany's lower leagues to become a Bundesliga striker at Hoffenheim. Tabakovic's prolific scoring in the 2. Bundesliga with Hertha Berlin earned him his big move and an international call-up.
Haris Tabakovic.playingStyle: Poacher and penalty-box predator with sharp movement, excellent positioning, and a cool head in front of goal
Haris Tabakovic.worldCup2026Role: Key attacking option who proved his worth with a crucial goal in the playoff final against Italy
Haris Tabakovic.notableFact: Scored in the playoff final against Italy and was a pivotal figure in Bosnia's historic qualification for the 2026 World Cup

Edin Visca.bio: One of the most decorated Bosnian players, Visca spent over a decade at Istanbul Basaksehir where he became their all-time top scorer and won the Turkish league title. A veteran winger with vast international experience.
Edin Visca.playingStyle: Tricky, inverted right winger who cuts inside onto his left foot, delivers dangerous set pieces, and provides creative spark
Edin Visca.worldCup2026Role: Veteran winger providing tournament experience, creativity from wide areas, and set-piece expertise
Edin Visca.notableFact: Scored over 100 goals for Istanbul Basaksehir across all competitions, making him one of the most prolific wingers in Turkish football history

Benjamin Tahirovic.bio: A highly-rated young midfielder who came through the Roma academy and earned a move to Ajax. Tahirovic represents the exciting new generation of Bosnian midfield talent with his composure and technical ability.
Benjamin Tahirovic.playingStyle: Technically gifted central midfielder who dictates tempo, excels in tight spaces, and has an eye for progressive passing
Benjamin Tahirovic.worldCup2026Role: Starting central midfielder tasked with controlling the tempo and linking defense to attack
Benjamin Tahirovic.notableFact: Became one of the youngest Bosnian players to feature in a major European league when he debuted for Roma in Serie A as a teenager

Armin Gigovic.bio: A young and dynamic midfielder who has developed impressively at Freiburg in the Bundesliga. Gigovic brings energy, technical quality, and goal threat from midfield to the Bosnian national team.
Armin Gigovic.playingStyle: Energetic, box-to-box midfielder who drives forward with the ball, contributes goals, and presses relentlessly
Armin Gigovic.worldCup2026Role: Key midfielder providing energy and dynamism in Bosnia's engine room alongside Tahirovic
Armin Gigovic.notableFact: Moved to Freiburg from Helsingborg as a teenager and has steadily established himself in one of the Bundesliga's most well-coached sides

Ivan Basic.bio: A left-footed midfielder with Serie A experience at Lazio. Basic brings creativity and set-piece quality to Bosnia's midfield options with his technical ability and eye for a pass.
Ivan Basic.playingStyle: Creative left-footed midfielder with excellent vision, capable of unlocking defenses with through balls and dangerous from dead-ball situations
Ivan Basic.worldCup2026Role: Creative midfield option off the bench, providing a different dimension with his left foot
Ivan Basic.notableFact: Signed for Lazio from Bordeaux and has contributed to Bosnia's midfield depth with his Serie A experience

Smail Prevljak.bio: A hardworking and reliable striker who has been a consistent performer in Belgian football and a regular contributor for the national team. Prevljak provides important squad depth in the forward positions.
Smail Prevljak.playingStyle: Industrious forward who works tirelessly for the team, runs the channels, and creates space for others with intelligent movement
Smail Prevljak.worldCup2026Role: Backup striker providing energy and pressing intensity as a substitute option
Smail Prevljak.notableFact: Has been a consistent goal scorer in Belgian football and a reliable contributor to Bosnia's qualifying campaigns

Stjepan Radeljic.bio: A dependable center-back who has gained valuable experience in Turkish football. Radeljic is a steady, no-frills defender who provides reliable backup to the starting center-back pairing.
Stjepan Radeljic.playingStyle: Traditional center-back who prioritizes defensive solidity, strong in the air and committed in the tackle
Stjepan Radeljic.worldCup2026Role: Squad depth center-back providing experienced cover for the starting defensive pair
Stjepan Radeljic.notableFact: Has been a consistent performer in Turkish football and a trusted member of the national team squad across multiple campaigns

Ermin Bicakcic.bio: One of the longest-serving Bosnian internationals, Bicakcic has spent the bulk of his career at Hoffenheim in the Bundesliga. A veteran defender who brings invaluable experience and leadership to the squad.
Ermin Bicakcic.playingStyle: Strong, experienced center-back who leads by example with his commitment, aerial ability, and positional awareness
Ermin Bicakcic.worldCup2026Role: Veteran defensive leader and mentor, providing tournament experience from the 2014 World Cup squad
Ermin Bicakcic.notableFact: Was part of the Bosnia squad at the 2014 World Cup in Brazil, the only other time the nation qualified for the tournament

Kenan Kodro.bio: Son of former Bosnian international Meho Kodro, Kenan has carried on the family legacy as a striker. Born in Spain, he has played across multiple leagues including spells at Athletic Bilbao and in the Middle East.
Kenan Kodro.playingStyle: Intelligent forward with good positioning, clinical finishing ability, and the awareness to find space in crowded penalty areas
Kenan Kodro.worldCup2026Role: Experienced backup striker providing additional depth and versatility in the forward line
Kenan Kodro.notableFact: Son of legendary Bosnian striker Meho Kodro, who also represented the national team, making them one of Bosnian football's most famous father-son duos

Amer Gojak.bio: A creative attacking midfielder who rose to prominence at Dinamo Zagreb before moving to Turkish football. Gojak is a technically gifted playmaker with an eye for a decisive pass.
Amer Gojak.playingStyle: Technically skilled attacking midfielder who creates chances with his vision, dribbling ability, and intelligent movement between the lines
Amer Gojak.worldCup2026Role: Attacking midfield option providing creativity and flair from the bench or in a more advanced role
Amer Gojak.notableFact: Won multiple Croatian league titles with Dinamo Zagreb and scored a memorable goal against Italy in the Nations League

Kenan Piric.bio: A talented young goalkeeper who has developed his career in Portuguese football with Boavista. Piric provides strong competition for the number one shirt and is highly regarded for his potential.
Kenan Piric.playingStyle: Agile goalkeeper with quick reflexes, good distribution with his feet, and confidence coming off the line
Kenan Piric.worldCup2026Role: Second-choice goalkeeper providing reliable backup to Nikola Vasilj
Kenan Piric.notableFact: Has gained valuable experience playing in the competitive Portuguese Primeira Liga and is seen as Bosnia's goalkeeper of the future

Amir Hadziahmetovic.bio: A defensive midfielder who has established himself in Turkish football at Besiktas. Hadziahmetovic is the shield in front of Bosnia's defense, breaking up play and recycling possession efficiently.
Amir Hadziahmetovic.playingStyle: Disciplined defensive midfielder who reads the game well, intercepts passes, and keeps the ball moving simply and effectively
Amir Hadziahmetovic.worldCup2026Role: Key defensive midfielder anchoring the midfield and protecting the backline in Bosnia's system
Amir Hadziahmetovic.notableFact: Moved from Konyaspor to Besiktas after impressive performances that caught the attention of one of Turkey's biggest clubs

Eldar Civic.bio: A reliable left-back who has played in Hungarian football with Ferencvaros, competing in both domestic and European competitions. Civic provides important depth at left-back behind Kolasinac.
Eldar Civic.playingStyle: Steady, reliable left-back who defends solidly and supports the attack with well-timed overlapping runs
Eldar Civic.worldCup2026Role: Backup left-back providing experienced cover for Sead Kolasinac
Eldar Civic.notableFact: Has represented Ferencvaros in the Champions League and Europa League, gaining valuable European competition experience

Josip Corluka.bio: A young goalkeeper from FK Sarajevo who represents the future of Bosnian goalkeeping. Corluka has been brought into the squad to gain experience alongside the more established goalkeepers.
Josip Corluka.playingStyle: Young, athletic goalkeeper with good reflexes and a willingness to learn from more experienced teammates
Josip Corluka.worldCup2026Role: Third-choice goalkeeper gaining invaluable experience by being part of the World Cup squad
Josip Corluka.notableFact: One of the youngest members of the squad, selected as part of Barbarez's commitment to developing the next generation of Bosnian talent

Tarik Muharemovic.bio: A young, left-footed center-back who came through the Juventus academy before moving to Sassuolo. Muharemovic is one of the most promising young defenders in Bosnian football with excellent technical ability.
Tarik Muharemovic.playingStyle: Elegant, left-footed center-back who is comfortable on the ball, capable of playing out from the back with composure and precision
Tarik Muharemovic.worldCup2026Role: Young defensive talent providing left-footed center-back option and future cornerstone of Bosnia's defense
Tarik Muharemovic.notableFact: Developed at Juventus's academy in Italy and has been tipped as one of the most exciting young Bosnian defenders in a generation

Ajdin Hasic.bio: A creative young talent who has shown flashes of brilliance at Besiktas in the Turkish Super Lig. Hasic is a technically gifted attacker who can operate across the forward line.
Ajdin Hasic.playingStyle: Skillful, creative attacker who takes on defenders, creates chances with his dribbling, and provides moments of individual brilliance
Ajdin Hasic.worldCup2026Role: Exciting young attacking option off the bench who can change games with his directness and creativity
Ajdin Hasic.notableFact: Attracted attention from several top European clubs as a teenager at Besiktas due to his exceptional technical ability

Nail Omerovic.bio: A young right-back developing in Swiss football with Lugano. Omerovic provides additional depth at right-back and represents the next generation of Bosnian defenders.
Nail Omerovic.playingStyle: Energetic young right-back who combines solid defending with the willingness to get forward and support attacks
Nail Omerovic.worldCup2026Role: Squad depth at right-back, providing backup to Amar Dedic and gaining senior tournament experience
Nail Omerovic.notableFact: Has been part of Switzerland's competitive league system at a young age and is considered one of Bosnia's top right-back prospects
